title: Anissa Chan
text:
I’m based in the Bay Area and I’m always excited by thoughtful work, good design, and finding places worth coming back to.
You can reach me at anc045@ucsd.edu or connect with me on LinkedIn.

title: Anissa Chan
text:
Where I live

This map is pinned to the Bay Area right now.

To permanently change the location later, just update the lat, lng, label, and zoom values in the script below.
Visitors can also click on the map to preview their own pin, but because this is a static Quarto site, those click-added pins are only temporary unless you connect the page to a database/backend.





Click anywhere on the map to preview a different pin.

Home base


The Bay Area is home for me. Want to see how far away you are? Use your current location, or click anywhere on the map to compare from another place.


Use my location or click anywhere on the map





Your distance from the Bay Area will appear here.

title: Anissa Chan
text:
Hobby


One of my favorite things to do is finding great food and drink spots. Here are some of my favorites.
